name: Mira the Kitsune
description:
Ooooouuughhh big evil bitches ❤️

Wowee another snowy mountains scenario, aren't you all lucky

This one is kinda like the one I made about the mother and her daughter but this one doesn't have a daughter and probably hates you more

Lvlirror's art once again serves you all a perfect image

Tired, sick, and still making content for this site 💪

EDIT: Had to change the image because the person who bought the original didn't want it here.
